true_header: Information relating to the existence of this agreement;
Information which was known by a party prior to receiving it from the other party if this can be demonstrated by written record;
Information which at the time of disclosure is in the public domain or which is published after disclosure or otherwise becomes part of  the public domain without breach of this agreement;
Information which the party can show was received from a third party who did not to the best knowledge of the party receive the information,
Information developed or created by one party independently of the other,
Information which is disclosed due to any requirement under mandatory law.
To treat all confidential information as absolutely secret, private and confidential;
To take all steps necessary to preserve such confidentiality and secrecy;
To prevent disclosure of any such confidential information to any third party;
To use the confidential information solely for the purpose set out in section 1;
To disclose the confidential information only to those of its directors,
To ascertain that each person who receives confidential information is made aware of and comply with this agreement;
To immediately upon request deliver to the other party all confidential information that belong to that party in any form without retaining any copies thereof,
This agreement shall be governed by the substantive laws of sweden.
This agreement enters into force when signed by both parties.

[(b)   the terms [(but not the existence)] of this agreement;
That  it  will  keep  all  confidential  information  strictly  confidential  and  will  not disclose  any  part  of  it  to  any  other  person  without  the  discloser's  prior  written consent[,
That it will use the same degree of care to protect the confidential information as it  uses  to  protect  its  own  confidential  information  of  a  similar  nature,
[(c) that it will act in good faith at all times in relation to the confidential information,
Is known to the recipient before disclosure by [or on behalf of] the discloser,
Is  or  becomes  publicly  known  through  no  act  or  default  on  the  part  of  the recipient;
[(c) is  obtained  by  the  recipient  from  a  third  party  in  circumstances  where  the recipient  has  no  reason  to  believe  that  there  has  been  a  breach  of  a  duty  of confidence.
[(a) the recipient will immediately cease to use the confidential information; and]
All  the  provisions  of  this  agreement  will  cease  to  have  effect,
Neither party may without the prior written consent of the other party assign, transfer,
This agreement is made for the benefit of the parties,
This agreement  constitutes the entire agreement between the parties  in relation to the subject matter of this agreement,
Neither party  will have  any remedy in respect  of any misrepresentation  (whether written or oral) made to it upon which it relied in entering into this agreement].

Are referring to the letter of agreement between nmod and gi concerning industrial participation in further development of gripen and related projects (the "loa");
Noting their wish to exchange  information  for the  purpose of conducting evaluations  of the gripen aircraft,
Noting that such exchange  of information  may involve the disclosure  of confidential  information  by either  party,

Noting that exchanging  information with  gi shall also include exchanging information  with  saab and upon such disclosure  saab shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions  contained  herein as if saab was a party to the  nda;

Noting that  exchanging  information with the  nmod shall also include other  norwegian authorities  and upon such disclosure  said norwegian authority  shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions contained  herein as if said norwegian authority was a party to the  nda.

That it shall treat the confidential  information directly or indirectly disclosed to it by the  disclosing  party as strictly confidential  and will  not without obtaining  the  prior written  consent  of the  disclosing  party disclose  any part of the confidential  information to any third  party,
That it shall not make  use of any part of  the confidential information disclosed to it by the disclosing party,
That it shall give access to the  confidential  information only,
That it shall  not copy or reproduce  in any form  any of the confidential information  disclosed  to it by the  disclosing  party,
That it shall  keep a current  record of all copies and reproductions  of the confidential  information.
At the time of disclosure  or thereafter  available to the  public generally through  no failure  on the  part of the  receiving party;
Known to the  receiving party at the time of its disclosure;
Disclosed to the  receiving party by a third party having the  right to disclose confidential  information  and without  restrictions  as to use or disclosure;
Developed  independently  by the  receiving party without  use of or reference  to the confidential  information  received.

Now,  therefore,  in  consideration  of  these  premises,  and  other  good  and  valuable consideration,  the  receipt  and  sufficiency  of  which  consideration  is  hereby  acknowledged,  the  recipient covenants and agrees with the receiver as follows:
All data and information, in whatever form communicated or maintained, whether orally,
All plans, proposals, reports, analyses, notes, studies, forecasts,
The existence and terms of this agreement and any other agreements related to a possible transaction;
The fact that information has been disclosed or made available to the recipient or the recipient's representatives;
The fact that discussions or negotiations are or may be taking place with respect to  a  possible  transaction,
Is  available  to  the  recipient  or  the  recipient's  representatives  on  a  non- confidential basis from a source other than the receiver,
Is  at  the  time  of  disclosure  known  to  the  recipient  or  thereafter  becomes generally  available  to  the  public,
"definitive  agreement" means a binding definitive  written  agreement to consummate a transaction;
"party"  means  a  party  to  this  agreement  and  "parties"  means  all  parties  to  this agreement;
"permitted purpose" shall have the meaning set out in recital c;
"person"  is  to  be  broadly  interpreted  to  include  any  individual,
"representatives" means, in respect of a party, such party’s agents,
"transaction" shall have the meaning set out in recital b.
As  a  condition  to  receiving  the  confidential  information,
The confidential information shall remain at all times the property of the company.
The  recipient  shall  comply  with  the  canada  personal  information  protection  and electronic  documents  act,
